Petitioner Barbara J Wammer, Individually And As Trustee'S Petition To Correct Arbitration Award, Or In The Alternative, To Vacate Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Dec-21-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
F. Chet Taylor, Esq., Taylor Law Office, PLC, 612-372-4300 for Petitioner and moving party: Barbara J. Wammer individually and as Trustee of the Nelson Irrevocable Trust and the Nelson Irrevoacable Marital Turst
Alvin L. Fishman, Tesler, Sandmann & Fishman, 415-781-5600 and Susan B. Yoffee, Pro Hac Vice (FL), Haile Shaw & Pfaffenberger, 561-627-8100 for Defendant and opposing party: 1st. Discount Brokerage, Inc.

Argued. The court adopts its tentative ruling. Petitioner Barbara J. Wammer, Individually And As Trustee of the Nelson Irrevocable Trust and the Nelson Irrevoacable Marital Trust's Petition To Correct Arbitration Award, Or In The Alternative, To Vacate Arbitration Award. Denied. The arbitrators did not exceed their powers.
The court confirm the arbitration award. Petitioner to prepare order. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
